rows.label: qev041903_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nio is an idiot... buying a dress
for Popo at a time like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0002
rows.name: Geez... he really is an idiot, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0003
rows.name:
The materials I want you to fetch are
Hitsujamo and Antorus Roses... mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0004
rows.name:
After all, we must make hair that looks
identical to the real thing, mo. It will not
work well unless they are top quality, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0005
rows.name: Oh right, I must give you your reward...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Wait, what is it, mo? Do you have
something you want to give Popo, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0007
rows.name: This sparkly blue... Could this be...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0008
rows.name:
This is undoubtedly the
wedding ring Nio bought, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0009
rows.name:
Oh my... what a miracle, mo! Could
such a thing really happen, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0010
rows.name:
But wasn't this stolen by
someone...? W-why do you have it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_JNK0010
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: qev041903_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you forgot when you obtained it.

rows.label: qev041903_JNK0020
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev041903_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell her you obtained it when you
defeated a wild Nopopotamus.

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0011
rows.name:
Could it be... while I was sleeping,
you mistook my Nopopotamus for some
wild monster and killed it, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0012
rows.name:
If I think of it as you obtaining
the ring that way, the story
makes perfect sense, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hey, hey... Are you saying that while I
was sleeping, you selfishly mistook it
for a wild creature and killed it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0014
rows.name:
I was so surprised when I woke up and the
Nopopotamus was suddenly a corpse, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ehh!? ...Does that mean that
you are the one who caused...
this entire commotion!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0016
rows.name:
T-That cannot be... Nio was
worrying so much that his hair
was falling out from stress, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hehe, the ring has made its way
back to us, so it is fine, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0018
rows.name:
Besides, you must not take on reckless
debts for Popo's sake anymore, mo. Popo is
perfectly happy with just this one ring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0019
rows.name:
Understood, mo... Nio... will protect Popo
by being true to himself from now on,
without stretching beyond his means, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041903_MSG0020
rows.name:
...This has turned into quite a strange story, but
regardless, thank you for everything, mo. This is
a token of our gratitude, please accept it, mo.[ST:wait ]
